Package lu.kbra.pclib.db.view

Class DataBaseView<T extends DataBaseEntry>

java.lang.Object
lu.kbra.pclib.db.view.DataBaseView<T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
SQLHookable, SQLQueryable<T>, AbstractDBView<T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
DeferredDataBaseView
